tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.shortDescription: General-purpose AI assistant for writing, coding, research, and problem-solving
tools.description: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship AI assistant, capable of handling writing, coding, document analysis, research, and multimodal tasks including image and video generation via Sora 2. It supports file uploads (PDFs, spreadsheets, images) and provides structured responses for a wide range of personal and professional tasks.
pros: Strong document analysis and data extraction
Large ecosystem of plugins and GPTs
tools.bestFor: General-purpose AI work, document analysis, coding assistance, research, and narrative video creation

tools.name: Claude
tools.shortDescription: AI assistant specialized in coding, technical writing, and structured reasoning
tools.description: Claude by Anthropic is highly regarded for coding and structured problem-solving. It produces clean, well-documented code with fewer logic errors than many alternatives. Claude Code helps with real projects and larger codebases, while Claude Cowork automates multi-step desktop tasks without requiring scripting knowledge.
cons: Higher pricing for advanced plans ($100/mo for Max)
Focused more on technical tasks than creative writing
tools.bestFor: Software development, debugging, refactoring, technical writing, research, and automating desktop tasks

tools.name: Gemini
tools.shortDescription: Google's AI assistant with deep research, audio summaries, and image editing
tools.description: Gemini is Google's top-performing AI assistant, built for research, writing, analysis, and multimodal work. It handles extremely large documents, offers audio overview summaries (podcast-style recaps), and includes Deep Research for structured, web-informed analysis. Nano Banana provides advanced image editing capabilities.
features: Extremely large context window (2M tokens on Pro)
Nano Banana image editing (background swaps, object additions, scene transformations)
Strong at summarizing long research papers
pros: Handles massive documents without losing context
Audio summaries make complex material easier to absorb
Nano Banana image editing is fast and flexible
cons: Advanced features require Pro or Ultra plans
Still requires fact-checking for critical work
Audio summaries limited on free tier
tools.bestFor: Research, analyzing long documents, studying, drafting reports, in-depth web research, and image editing

tools.name: Grok
tools.shortDescription: X's AI assistant focused on real-time topics, fact-checking, and uncensored generation
tools.description: Grok is X's AI assistant, tightly integrated into the platform. It's widely used for fact-checking posts, participating in debates, and generating memes and uncensored images. Features like 'Think' and 'Deep Search' improve response quality. Grok Imagine extends into fast AI video generation for rapid visual ideas.
pros: Fast and capable for real-time topics
Good for trending topics and debates
cons: Requires X Premium or Premium+ subscription
Constant AI tagging on X can disrupt conversation flow
tools.bestFor: Real-time fact-checking, debate, meme creation, uncensored image/video generation, and rapid visual experiments

tools.name: Jasper
tools.shortDescription: AI copywriting tool for marketing teams and content creators
tools.description: Jasper is a popular AI writing assistant focused on marketing copy, blog posts, ad copy, and social media content. It offers brand voice customization, templates for common use cases, and integrations with SEO tools like Surfer SEO.
features: 50+ templates (blog posts, ads, emails, social media)
SEO mode with Surfer SEO integration
pros: Strong for marketing copy and ad creative
tools.bestFor: Marketing teams, content creators, bloggers, and ad copywriters

tools.name: Rytr
tools.shortDescription: Affordable AI writing assistant with unlimited usage on the $29/month plan
tools.description: Rytr is a budget-friendly AI writing tool offering unlimited content generation at a fraction of the cost of competitors like Jasper. It provides 40+ templates, tone customization, and support for 30+ languages.
cons: Output quality can vary across content types
tools.bestFor: Budget-conscious content creators, bloggers, and small businesses needing unlimited content

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.shortDescription: AI copywriting platform with workflow automation for marketing teams
tools.description: Copy.ai is an AI-powered copywriting tool designed for marketing teams. It offers templates for emails, social media, ad copy, and blog posts, plus workflow automation to streamline content creation processes.
tools.bestFor: Marketing teams, agencies, and businesses needing workflow automation for content at scale

tools.name: Veo 3.2
tools.shortDescription: Google's cinematic AI video generator with realistic lighting and motion
tools.description: Veo 3.2 creates short, cinematic video clips from text prompts or images. It excels at realistic lighting, smooth camera movement, and synchronized sound, making it ideal for dramatic moments, trailers, branded visuals, and mood-driven scenes.
cons: Not ideal for long, dialogue-heavy content
tools.bestFor: Product ads, brand spots, social media teasers, concept visuals, mood pieces, and high-impact cinematic shots

tools.name: Sora 2
tools.shortDescription: OpenAI's narrative-focused AI video generator with dialogue and emotional coherence
tools.description: Sora 2 is OpenAI's AI video generator, built for cinematic, story-driven clips with dialogue and emotional coherence. It's integrated into ChatGPT Plus and designed for narrative video creation.
cons: Limited generations per month on Plus
tools.bestFor: Narrative storytelling, short films, trailers, emotional scenes, and story-driven content

tools.name: Synthesia
tools.shortDescription: AI video platform for business training and presentations with realistic avatars
tools.description: Synthesia turns prompts, scripts, documents, or slides into presenter-led videos using realistic AI avatars. It's designed for business use cases like training, onboarding, product explainers, and internal communications. Video Agents allow interactive, conversational videos.
features: AI Playground (free Veo 3 and Sora 2 access)
pros: Strong for business training and onboarding
cons: Higher price point for business use
tools.bestFor: Employee training, onboarding, product explainers, internal communications, multilingual content, and interactive role-play learning

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.shortDescription: Realistic AI voice generator with voice cloning and voice agents
tools.description: ElevenLabs generates highly realistic AI voices from text and allows voice cloning with impressive accuracy. It supports multiple languages, tones, and voice tags like [whispers], [sarcastic], or [laughs]. Voice Agents enable real-time conversational bots for customer support and apps.
features: Voice tags for emotional delivery ([whispers], [laughs], etc.)
Voice Agents for real-time conversational bots
tools.bestFor: Audiobooks, podcast narration, YouTube voiceovers, voice cloning, customer support bots, call automation, and voice interfaces

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.shortDescription: Google's AI note-taker that answers questions using your own documents
tools.description: NotebookLM helps you understand and organize large amounts of information. You upload notes, PDFs, or course materials, and it summarizes them, answers questions, and generates podcast-style audio recaps. Ideal for studying, research, and reviewing dense material.
cons: Usage limits on free plan (queries, audio summaries)
tools.bestFor: Studying for exams, reviewing research papers, summarizing long documents, preparing reports, organizing project materials, and getting up to speed on dense topics

tools.name: Cursor
tools.shortDescription: AI-first code editor built for developers
tools.description: Cursor is an AI-first code editor designed for developers. It offers code generation, debugging, refactoring, and context-aware suggestions. It integrates with popular development workflows and supports multiple programming languages.
cons: Not as mature as VSCode ecosystem
tools.bestFor: Software development, debugging, refactoring, and AI-assisted coding

tools.name: Gamma
tools.shortDescription: AI presentation and document creator that turns notes into polished slides
tools.description: Gamma turns notes into presentations, documents, and simple webpages. It's designed for quick, polished output without manual design work. Ideal for pitch decks, reports, and visual communication.
pros: Good for pitch decks and reports
cons: Free tier has strict AI credit limits
Export options limited on lower tiers
tools.bestFor: Pitch decks, reports, presentations, and quick visual communication

tools.name: Fathom
tools.shortDescription: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings
tools.description: Fathom records meetings and produces summaries, transcripts, and action items. It integrates with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Ideal for keeping track of decisions and follow-ups without manual note-taking.
features: Integration with Zoom, Google Meet, Teams
tools.bestFor: Recording meetings, generating summaries, tracking action items, and keeping meeting history searchable

categories.description: General-purpose AI chatbots for writing, research, and problem-solving

categories.description: AI-powered writing tools for copywriting, content creation, and editing
